title: Create & Conquer
description: a Create focused modpack with a little bit of adventuring and heinous mobs on the side
body:
A fabric based, Create focused modpack with a little bit of fun on the adventuring side thanks to YUNG's structures and terrain gen mods like Terralith to make that 5000 block train field trip much more enjoyable, spiced up with Marium's Soulslike Weaponry mod there to beat you up when youre not in the mood on creating another megafactory with the create mod. and as little bit of advice, you might not want to rush the enderdragon ;)

all screenshots in the gallery are taken with [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) and [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

mod numbers according to modmenu is 190 mods and 83 libraries which are but not limited to:


- Create mods:
    - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
    - [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
    - [Create Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation/version/1.20.1-1.4.0-fabric)
    - [Create: Extended Cogwheels](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-cogwheels/version/2.1.0-1.20.1-0.5.1.c-fabric)


- Adventure
    - [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)
    - [Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures/version/4.0-1.20-fabric)
    - [YUNG's Better End Island](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island)
    - [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
    - [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
    - [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
    - [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)
    - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)


- Combat
    - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
    - [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mariums-soulslike-weaponry)
    - [Savage Ender Dragon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/savage-ender-dragon)
    - [Mob Captains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-captains)


- Building, Fun, QoL, etc.
    - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map/version/1.34.1_Fabric_1.20)
    - [Immersive Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings)
    - [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting)
    - [Let's Do: Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinery)
    - [Beautify: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated)
    - [Immersive Aircraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-aircraft)
    - [Magnum Torch](https://modrinth.com/mod/magnum-torch)
    - [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
    - [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)


- Performance related and bugfixes
    - [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore)
    - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
    - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
    - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
    - [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
